opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Site is phone-only with no booking tool, form, or CRM detected.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC calls after hours go unanswered and directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat scheduler on site to capture and book leads 24/7.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact with no digital intake.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call is lost with zero data retained for follow-up.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording and CRM capture to log every inbound lead automatically.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected on a seasonal HVAC business in Boise, Idaho.
opportunities.observation: Boise's harsh winters and hot summers create ideal recurring revenue potential going untapped.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal tune-up reminders via AI-driven email and SMS to past customers.
